hero.copy: Short ingredient lists, refillable glass, and percentages printed where you can read them. Skincare that says exactly what it does — and then does it.
hero.aria: A bottle of serum on a soft blush backdrop

products.title: Loved, and worth it.
products.copy: The formulas that account for most of what we make, and almost all of what people come back for.
products.empty: No products have been published yet. Add one in the admin and it appears on this shelf.

journal.title: Notes from the formulation bench.
journal.empty: Nothing has been written yet. Publish a journal entry in the admin and it appears here.

values.title: Four things we will not trade away.

one.title: Cruelty-free
one.copy: Never tested on animals, anywhere, by anyone acting for us. Certified, not merely claimed.

two.title: Dermatologist-tested
two.copy: Patch-tested on real skin across every tone and type before a single bottle is sold.

three.title: Refillable
three.copy: Heavy pharmaceutical glass built to outlive its contents. Send it back, or refill it at home.

four.title: Vegan
four.copy: No ingredient of animal origin. No exceptions hidden three lines down the list.

quote.text: The rare beauty brand that puts the number on the bottle. You always know what you are buying, and it is always what it says.
quote.author: Élise Moreau

newsletter.title: Skin notes, once a month.
newsletter.copy: What we are formulating, what the research actually says, and first access to a restock. No daily nonsense.
newsletter.label: Email address
newsletter.note: Unsubscribe in one click. We never sell your address.

ingredients.title: Ingredients
ingredients.body: The full list, with the percentage of every active, is printed on the carton and repeated in the description below. No undeclared fragrance, no proprietary blends.

howToUse.title: How to use
howToUse.body: Apply to clean, dry skin. Introduce one new active at a time and give it four weeks before you judge it — skin turns over slowly, and so does the evidence.

shipping.title: Shipping & returns
shipping.body: Complimentary shipping on orders over $50, dispatched within one working day. If it does not suit your skin, send it back within 60 days — opened is fine.

archive.intro: Every formula we make, in one place.
archive.empty: Nothing has been published here yet.
